_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: UMAP of 22 664 cells of four human MPNST samples, profiled by the 10× Genomics platform...FAP is predominantly expressed in tumor cells with a Schwann-like phenotype
details: Successfully analyzed single-cell RNA-seq data from 22,664 cells across four human MPNST samples, revealing FAP expression patterns in different cell types
